required_inputs: request scope and requested royalty administration outcome
franchise agreement, FDD fee schedule, and tenant approval matrix
authority map for legal, accounting, tax, AR, audit, privacy, access, records, and executive approval decisions
required_outputs: orchestrator return or routed owner guidance
refusal_triggers: request asks for legal interpretation, GAAP policy, tax advice, collections strategy, audit finding, fee waiver, write-off, payment approval, or official-record approval authority
request treats royalty record maintenance as authority to decide the underlying dispute, default, balance certification, or financial approval
request treats franchise royalty administration as generic contribution, donor, member, or back-office administration

required_inputs: FTC, NASAA, NAICS, FASB, IRS, NARA, and NIST source baseline
tenant policy hierarchy and source hierarchy
franchise agreement, FDD version, jurisdiction, and period context
refusal_triggers: required public or tenant source context is missing
FTC/NASAA disclosure records, tenant policy, franchise agreement, accounting instruction, tax instruction, or system records materially conflict
source is stale enough to change fee, retention, access, accounting handoff, or tax handoff handling

required_inputs: unit, franchisee, period, fee type, and work item
franchise agreement, amendment, FDD Item 6 fee schedule, and approved exceptions
POS export, portal sales report, gross-sales support, invoice, AR ledger, payment record, bank deposit, approved credit, dispute case, and audit note
retention, access, QA, and audit evidence
refusal_triggers: required agreement, FDD fee, sales, payment, adjustment, retention, access, QA, or audit evidence is missing
systems of record conflict on fee rate, period, sales base, due date, unit status, or payment status
completion or handoff is requested without authoritative royalty evidence

required_inputs: brand, unit, franchisee, period, fee type, jurisdiction, and data-category context
retention schedule, legal-hold status, access owner, and approval owner records
refusal_triggers: franchise management, POS, portal, ERP, AR, payment, bank, document, workflow, IAM, QA, or audit access is missing
franchise agreement, FDD version, unit roster, period, fee type, or source hierarchy cannot be established
jurisdiction, brand, unit, or data-category context has not been retrieved

required_inputs: retention, legal-hold, privacy, access, accounting, tax, payment, and approval markers
refusal_triggers: missing records or permissions materially change the outcome
policy, contract, accounting, tax, or source conflict remains unresolved
adjacent approval, regulated interpretation, or official-record authority is required
request belongs to legal, franchise compliance, revenue accounting, tax, AR collections, audit, payment approval, privacy, IAM, contract, records, or executive approval ownership
handoff is attempted without minimum unit, period, agreement, fee, sales, payment, and system context
ownership remains ambiguous after boundary review

required_inputs: agreement, fee schedule, unit, period, report, payment, and version rules
refusal_triggers: requested update lacks source support or delegated authority
required agreement, FDD, sales, payment, attachment, version, classification, or QA evidence is missing
royalty package cannot be tied to authoritative unit, period, agreement, and payment records

required_inputs: legal-hold, redaction, privacy, payment-data, and disposition status
approved publication, distribution, or handoff rule
required_outputs: retention, access, or governance escalation package
refusal_triggers: retention, legal-hold, access, privacy, redaction, payment-data, or publication authority is missing or conflicting
request asks for distribution, disposal, publication, or external sharing before controls are verified
records schedule or repository permission conflicts with the requested action
request asks the records lane to decide the underlying royalty dispute, default, legal, tax, accounting, audit, financial, or contract outcome
request asks for official balance approval, write-off, waiver, legal-hold release, or policy override
request widens royalty administration into generic finance, contract, legal, or member-contribution management

required_inputs: brand, unit, franchisee, territory, agreement, FDD Item 6, gross-sales, POS, portal, AR, ACH, ad-fund, technology fee, dispute, retention, access, QA, and audit context
public baseline plus tenant adaptation requirements
refusal_triggers: franchise royalty records are replaced with generic contribution, membership, billing, or operations abstractions
brand, unit, agreement, jurisdiction, retention, access, fee, or source-system differences materially alter the workflow and are not supplied
industry terminology is used cosmetically without agreement, FDD, unit, sales-report, payment, fee, and evidence context
